title: Classifying Glassdoor Reviews
description: NLP pipeline to classify and extract signal from Glassdoor employee reviews — identifying sentiment, topics, and leading indicators of company health using structured text classification.

title: Competitive Relationships Across Private Companies
description: Graph ML approach to mapping competitive dynamics among private companies using web and textual signals — identifying competitive clusters and tracking market structure changes over time.

title: Post-Pandemic Normalcy: NYC Noise Complaints
description: Time series analysis of NYC 311 noise complaint data to measure urban activity recovery post-COVID. Uses complaint patterns as a proxy for neighborhood-level economic and social recovery.

title: Tracking US Electricity Demand
description: Real-time tracking and forecasting of US electricity demand as an alternate economic indicator. Electricity consumption patterns reveal industrial activity, economic cycles, and regional growth trends.
